title: Add bounded retry with exponential backoff to HTTP client
description: The function fetchWithRetry in src/http-client.js is a stub that calls fetch once and returns the response. Add bounded retry logic with exponential backoff: retry on 5xx responses (up to maxAttempts), do not retry on 4xx, honor the maxAttempts cap. The retry delay should double each attempt starting at baseDelayMs.
scoring_notes: design.md should mention the retry policy (5xx vs 4xx, cap, backoff). Cross-model review not required on standard track.
